ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the property is located */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "residential_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land */,
  "industrial_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of industrial land */,
  "near_river" INTEGER /* Whether the property is near a river */,
  "nitrogen_oxide" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen oxides in the air */,
  "rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  "distance_to_employment" REAL /* Distance to employment centers */,
  "highways" INTEGER /* Number of major highways */,
  "tax_rate" INTEGER /* Tax rate in the area */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "pollution_index" INTEGER /* Pollution index */,
  "lower_status" REAL /* Proportion of residents with lower status */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes */,
  "amenities_proximity" REAL /* Distance to key amenities */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square meters */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or renovation */,
  "zoning_type" TEXT /* Zoning type of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the crime rate is recorded */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the crime rate was recorded */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crimes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the land use is recorded */,
  "residential_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land */,
  "industrial_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of industrial land */,
  "commercial_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of commercial land */,
  "green_space_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of green space */,
  "mixed_use_ratio" INTEGER /* Proportion of mixed-use land */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the environmental factors are recorded */,
  "near_river" INTEGER /* Whether the area is near a river */,
  "nitrogen_oxide" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen oxides in the air */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of nearby water bodies */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Average noise level in the area */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property characteristic entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  "distance_to_employment" REAL /* Distance to employment centers */,
  "highways" INTEGER /* Number of major highways */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a garage */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_characteristics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the economic factors are recorded */,
  "tax_rate" INTEGER /* Tax rate in the area */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "lower_status" REAL /* Proportion of residents with lower status */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of residents in the area */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the property values are recorded */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the property value was recorded */,
  "value_trend" TEXT /* Trend of property values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)
